steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the order in which the two winners received the award. The answer must highlight the chronological sequence—which comes first and which comes later.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content:
The correct response accomplishes this by presenting Sanjay Rao's 1994 award first, then explicitly marking Daniel Flores's 1995 award with the word later.

This structure and language make the time sequence immediately clear.

The other choices either name only one recipient, omit the years or fail to connect both awards in a time relationship.

That confirms B is correct.
